scripts.lighthouse: mkdir -p lighthouse-reports && npx lighthouse https://pauseai.uk --output=html --output=json --output-path="lighthouse-reports/prod-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)-$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S)" --view
scripts.lighthouse:dev: npx start-server-and-test 'npx serve site -p 3001' http://localhost:3001 "mkdir -p lighthouse-reports && npx lighthouse http://localhost:3001 --output=html --output=json --output-path=lighthouse-reports/dev-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)-$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S) --view"
scripts.lighthouse:branch: slug=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/-/g' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]') && sha=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) && ts=$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S) && url="https://pauseai.uk/preview/$slug/" && status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$url") && if [ "$status" = "200" ]; then mkdir -p lighthouse-reports && npx lighthouse "$url" --output=html --output=json --output-path="lighthouse-reports/branch-$sha-$ts" --view; else echo "No preview found at $url (HTTP $status)"; fi
